name: agenttrust-scorecard
description: Heuristic trust scorecard + red-team checklist for Join39 agents. Provide a username and optional interaction context; returns a 0-100 metadata-based score across identity, capability transparency, security boundaries, observability, and reputation.

functionDefinition.name: agenttrust-scorecard
functionDefinition.description: Create a concise trust scorecard for a Join39 agent BEFORE interacting with it. Call when the user asks whether an agent is trustworthy/safe, wants to evaluate an agent's identity/capabilities, or wants a red-team checklist. You must pass the agent's username (like 'alice' or '@alice').

username.description: Join39 username of the target agent (e.g. 'alice' or '@alice').

interaction_context.description: What you plan to do with the agent (e.g., 'give it access to email', 'ask for medical advice').

agent_claims.description: Optional: free-form text describing the agent's claims/policies (extra signal).
